product.name: JUMLEE cordless mini chain saw
identity: JUMLEE brand spelling and red-black logo
compact teal and black handheld chain saw body with red controls

facts.text: The guide bar is visibly marked 6 inches.
facts.evidence: The product image clearly shows a 6-inch marking on the guide bar.

facts.text: A black upper chain guard is visible above the guide bar.
facts.evidence: The product image clearly shows the guard.

creative.audience: US homeowners and DIYers looking for a compact tool for light pruning tasks
creative.problem: a full-size saw can feel excessive for one small pruning job
creative.primary_benefit: a compact format for controlled light-pruning tasks
creative.proof_shot: Show eye protection, work gloves, a stable stance, and a small dry branch secured to a workbench; make one slow controlled cut while keeping the free hand far from the chain path and never bypassing the guard.
creative.setting: an ordinary backyard workbench in natural daylight with no children or pets nearby

assets.description: Front product and packaging reference image
